Actualizado: 2026-05-17

Germán Molpeceres

Molecular Astrophysicist & Astrochemist

Welcome to the webmage of Germán Molpeceres. I am an astrochemist based in Madrid working in the study of the emergence of chemical complexity in the interstellar medium from a theoretical approach, combining electronic structure calculations, theoretical modeling and astrochemical modeling.

Collaborators

Prof. J. Kästner, Dr. V. Zaverkin, J. C. del Valle, Prof. N. Watanabe, Prof. Y. Oba, Prof. M. Tsuge, Dr. T. Nguyen, Prof. T. Lamberts, Prof. Petr Slavicek, Prof. R. Oliveira, Prof. C. Shingledecker, Prof. S. Vogt, Dr. G. Bovolenta, Dr. B. Maté, Dr. V. Rivilla, Dr. I. Jiménez-Serra, Dr. M. Sanz-Novo, Dr. L. Colzi, Dr. C. Cabezas, M. Mallo, Dr. M. Agúndez, Prof. J. Cernicharo, Dr. O. Roncero, Prof. Y. Aikawa, Dr. K. Furuya, Dr. A. Ishibashi, Dr. J. Enrique-Romero, Dr. J. García de la Concepción
